name: raylog
title: Raylog
description: Manage focused local tasks from Raycast with a standalone markdown note.
author: dillon-mccardell

commands.name: list-tasks
commands.title: List Tasks
commands.description: Focus, filter, and move Raylog tasks through their lifecycle.

preferences.name: showDueDateIndicator
preferences.title: Show Due Countdown
preferences.description: Show the due date countdown in the task list.
preferences.label: Show Due Countdown

preferences.name: showStartDateIndicator
preferences.title: Show Start Countdown
preferences.description: Show the start date countdown in the task list.
preferences.label: Show Start Countdown

preferences.name: dueSoonDays
preferences.title: Due Soon Days
preferences.description: How many days ahead should count as due soon in List Tasks.
preferences.label: Due Soon Days

commands.name: add-task
commands.title: Add Task
commands.description: Capture a new Raylog task with dates and status.

preferences.name: storageNotePath
preferences.title: Storage Note
preferences.description: Markdown note used for Raylog storage.
preferences.label: Storage Note

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
